chunks.text: Reader & Undergraduate Course Staff 1 (UCS1) Qualifications - EECS at Berkeley Reader & Undergraduate Course Staff 1 (UCS1) Qualifications In order to apply to be a Reader or UCS1 (Undergraduate Course Staff 1), you must meet the following qualificat

e Staff 1), you must meet the following qualifications: Be in good academic standing (i.e., cannot be on academic probation or have more than 2 incomplete grades) Be enrolled in the minimum number of units approved by your college by the second week

units approved by your college by the second week of classes (one week before the regular campus deadline) Have an overall GPA of 3.0 or higher, and maintain this GPA during the semester you are teaching Have previously taken the course, its equivale

ing Have previously taken the course, its equivalent, or a more advanced course with a grade of B or better Attend the New ASE Orientation before the beginning of the semester (first-time Readers or UCS1s) Other information: Current Pay Rates for ASE

CS1s) Other information: Current Pay Rates for ASEs Work-study does not apply for Reader or UCS1 positions Campus Guide: Reader and UCS1 duties and qualifications The following courses hire only UCS1s : CS 61A CS 61B CS 61C The following courses hire
